# Robots.txt for UCX - Texas Managed IT Services Provider
# https://ucx.co

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Priority pages for crawling
Allow: /about
Allow: /services/
Allow: /contact
Allow: /leadership
Allow: /careers

# Disallow admin and private areas
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /private/
Disallow: /temp/
Disallow: /*.json$
Disallow: /*.xml$
Disallow: /api/

# Allow specific bots
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot  
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckDuckBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Baiduspider
Allow: /

User-agent: YandexBot
Allow: /

User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

User-agent: LinkedInBot
Allow: /

# Crawl delay for respectful crawling
Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://ucx.co/sitemap.xml

# Host preference
Host: https://ucx.co
